subcodes.title: Public address given on 1913-02-19
subcodes.first_line: The prophets of God are the real Instructors and Educators, so that the morality of the people is improved, the ignorant become wise, the blind receive sight
subcodes.first_line_orig: انبیای الهی و عقلا و فلاسفهٴ عالم در هر حال تربیترا از برای عالم خلقت اهم امورو اعظم شئون گفتند
subcodes.subjects: @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha, @autobiographical account; narrative of Abdu'l-Baha, @Manifestation of God as educator, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
